name: erp-pos
description: ERP / Punto de Venta - sistema completo de gestion comercial

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n SERVER,CLIENT -c green,cyan "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.start: npm run build --prefix client && npm run start --prefix server
